steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Python to compute core indicators for Energisa based on provided December 2024 data
assets_total = 77181653000.0
cash = 899139000.0
current_assets = 18016017000.0
current_liabilities = 15794861000.0
debt_current = 6321362000.0
debt_noncurrent = 28796199000.0
equity = 22143222000.0
revenue = 33715476000.0
cogs = 25151840000.0
net_income = 4636282000.0
ebit = 6110922000.0
# shares
issued = 2289424663.0
treasury = 3772375.0
shares_out = issued - treasury
# computed metrics
assets = assets_total
nw_cash = cash
net_debt = (debt_current + debt_noncurrent) - cash
# EV calculation: use market cap + net debt
market_cap = shares_out * 12.0
enterprise_value = market_cap + max(net_debt,0)
# gross margin etc
gross_profit = revenue - cogs
marg_bruta = gross_profit / revenue * 100.0
marg_ebit = ebit / revenue * 100.0
marg_liquida = net_income / revenue * 100.0
# EBIT / Ativo (EBIT / Total assets)
ebit_ativo = ebit / assets * 100.0
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
fornecedores = 2856826000.0
caixa = cash
roic = ebit / (assets - fornecedores - caixa)
roe = net_income / equity
liquidez_corr = (current_assets - current_liabilities) / current_liabilities # current net / current liabilities
# P/VP etc
vp_per_share = equity / shares_out
p_vp = 12.0 / vp_per_share
lpa = net_income / shares_out
vpa = vp_per_share
p_l = 12.0 / lpa
psr_per_share = revenue / shares_out
p_ativos = 12.0 / (assets / shares_out)
p_cap_giro = 12.0 / ((current_assets - current_liabilities) / shares_out)
p_atr_liq = 12.0 / ((current_assets - current_liabilities) / shares_out)
#giro ativos
giro_ativos = revenue / assets
# P/EBIT
p_ebit = 12.0 / (ebit / shares_out)
# P/L  already computed
#  EV/EBIT
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit
#  EV/ EBITDA cannot compute without EBITDA; set as NA
# print results
print('Shares outstanding:', shares_out)
print('Market cap (BRL):', market_cap)
print('EV (BRL):', enterprise_value)
print('Dívida bruta (BRL):', debt_current + debt_noncurrent)
print('Dívida líquida (BRL):', net_debt)
print('Receita líquida (aprox):', revenue)
print('Margem bruta:', marg_bruta)
print('Marg EBIT:', marg_ebit)
print('Marg net:', marg_liquida)
print('ROE:', roe)
print('ROIC:', roic)
print('Liquidez Corr (x):', liquidez_corr)
print('P/VP:', p_vp)
print('P/L:', p_l)
print('P/EBIT:', p_ebit)
print('P/Ativos:', p_ativos)
print('Giro Ativos:', giro_ativos)
print('EV/EBIT:', ev_ebit)
print('VPA (BRL):', vp_per_share)
print('LPA (BRL):', lpa)
print('PSR:', revenue / shares_out / 1.0 / 1.0 / 1.0) 
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

ebit = 6110922000.0

treas = 3772375.0
shares_out = issued - treas
market_cap = shares_out * 12.0
net_debt = (debt_cur + debt_noncur) - cash
ev = market_cap + max(net_debt,0)
# margins
gross_profit = rev - cogs
m_gross = gross_profit / rev * 100.0
m_ebit = et = bit / rev * 100.0
m_net = net / rev * 100.0
# ratios
roe = net / equity
roic = bit / (assets - 2868260000.0 - cash) if (assets - 2868260000.0 - cash) != 0 else None
liqu_corr = (cur_assets - cur_liab) / cur_liab
p_vp = 12.0 / (equity / shares_out)
lpa = net / shares_out
vpa = equity / shares_out
psr = 12.0 / (rev / shares_out)
p_atrs = 12.0 / (assets / shares_out)
p_cap_giro = 12.0 / (((cur_assets - cur_liab) / shares_out))
giro = rev / assets
p_ebit = 12.0 / (ebit / shares_out)
ev_ebit = ev / bit
print('PSR corrected:', psr)
print('LPA:', lpa)
print('VPA:', vpa)
print('P/VP:', p_vp)
print('P/L:', 12.0 / lpa)
print('EV/EBIT:', ev_ebit)
"} }
